scdown 0.5.1
  • Get Started
  • Reference
    • Core
    • Getting Started
  • Changelog

Package index

Main workflows

scdown()
Create a scdown object
summarize_dataset()
Summarize dataset structure
plot_map()
Plot cluster or annotation maps
find_markers()
Find marker genes for each annotation
check_annotation()
Check annotation with known marker panels
plot_average_expression()
Plot average expression by annotation
plot_cluster_similarity()
Plot similarity between annotations
plot_signature()
Plot signature or pathway scores
infer_communication()
Infer exploratory cell-cell communication
run_core()
Run the minimal downstream workflow
build_scdown_report()
Build a compact HTML report

Inputs and example data

scdown_example()
Example annotated scRNA-seq dataset

Built-in resources

immune_signatures()
Built-in immune signatures
immune_marker_panels()
Built-in immune marker panels
list_signatures()
List available signatures
get_signature()
Get one signature

On this page

Developed by Daiki User.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
